name: whyvec
description: Counterfactual compiler evidence for safe, repository-aware loop optimization.

interface.shortDescription: Turn missed vectorization into tested compiler obligations.
interface.longDescription: WhyVec gives Codex replayed counterfactual compiler evidence, typed source obligations, repository discovery, explicit strategy comparison, guarded validation, and auditable repair or refusal traces.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $whyvec-optimize to replay WhyVec evidence, inspect repository contracts, and select, validate, or refuse a safe repair.
